about.title: About Me
about.summary: Full Stack Developer, specialized in Spring Boot and Angular, with over 2 years of experience. I design and develop high-performance and scalable business applications, with particular attention to code quality and the integration of intelligent solutions (AI).

serviceData.aboutSummary: Full Stack Developer specialized in Spring Boot and Angular, with over 2 years of experience. I design and develop high-performance and scalable business applications, with particular attention to code quality and the integration of intelligent solutions (AI).

exp1.description: Participation in the development of several full stack business-oriented projects, combining Spring Boot, Angular and AI-based solutions.

achievements.ach1: Development of a real-time AI application for facial micro-expression analysis (Synergology)
achievements.ach2: Design of a community platform and art marketplace with conversational AI assistant (ArtIA)
achievements.ach3: Implementation of an intelligent CV extraction and automatic structuring system
achievements.ach4: Integration of AI solutions (STT, TTS, LLM) for voice assistants and chatbots
achievements.ach5: Development of secure applications with authentication and user profile management

exp2.description: End-of-studies project on the design and development of an online contest management platform.

achievements.ach1: Development of a web platform automating the contest process
achievements.ach2: Implementation of automatic pre-selection score calculation algorithm
achievements.ach3: Complete management of online registrations and candidate filtering
achievements.ach4: Design of a clear and responsive user interface with Angular

exp3.description: Internship focused on backend development of a car rental application.

achievements.ach1: Design and development of a car reservation system
achievements.ach3: Creation of dashboards for tracking rentals
achievements.ach4: Collaboration with the frontend team for feature integration

proj1.title: ArtIA – Art Marketplace & Community Platform
proj1.description: Community platform and art marketplace with conversational AI assistant enabling intelligent navigation based on natural language queries.
proj1.shortDescription: Art marketplace with intelligent AI assistant

features.feat1: Interactive gallery with personalized artist profiles
features.feat2: Secure marketplace for artists and collectors
features.feat3: Conversational AI assistant for intelligent navigation
features.feat4: Natural language queries and personalized recommendations

proj2.title: Talent Marketplace
proj2.description: Secure platform connecting talents with companies featuring robust authentication and complete user profile management.

features.feat2: Complete management of talent and company profiles
features.feat4: Robust REST backend with Spring Boot

proj3.title: Synergology – Micro-Expression Analysis
proj3.description: Real-time AI application for facial micro-expression analysis and behavioral interpretation.
proj3.shortDescription: Real-time behavioral analysis powered by AI

features.feat1: Real-time facial micro-expression detection and interpretation
features.feat2: Integration of Python AI services with Spring Boot backend
features.feat4: Interactive web interface developed with Angular

proj4.title: Made4You – Artisan E-commerce Platform
proj4.description: Complete e-commerce platform with AI assistant for customer service and personalized recommendations.

features.feat1: Complete management of artisan product catalog
features.feat2: Secure shopping cart and payment system
features.feat4: AI assistant for instant customer support

proj5.title: CVThèque – Intelligent CV Extraction
proj5.description: Automatic CV extraction and structuring system using AI (Groq API) with management interface.

features.feat1: Automatic extraction of information from CVs
features.feat3: REST backend API for database insertion
features.feat4: Angular interface for upload and CV management
features.feat5: Intelligent parsing of skills and experiences

proj6.title: CallBot – Intelligent Voice Assistant
proj6.description: Intelligent voice assistant for automatic appointment scheduling using STT, TTS and LLM.
proj6.shortDescription: AI voice assistant for appointment management

proj7.title: Online Contest Management (Final Project)
proj7.description: Web application automating the contest process with online registration and pre-selection algorithm.

features.feat2: Automatic pre-selection score calculation via algorithm

proj8.title: Car Rental Application
proj8.description: Web solution for car management and reservation with availability system.
